# HDR

**Category:** EPC / Commissioning  
**Website:** https://www.hdrinc.com/

## Headline
Engineering and delivery partner relevant to complex infrastructure planning and execution.

## Overview
HDR is relevant as an engineering and delivery partner for buyers who need help translating infrastructure strategy into executable projects. It belongs in the directory less as a hardware vendor and more as a partner for planning, design coordination, and delivery complexity.

## Key capabilities
- engineering and planning support
- delivery coordination
- large-project infrastructure execution support

## Best fit for
- organizations managing complex infrastructure programs
- buyers needing upstream planning support
- teams looking for experienced delivery partners

## Considerations
Most useful when compared alongside EPC and commissioning firms rather than component vendors.
